data.name: Cheeta

weaponImprint.name: MP7H1
weaponImprint.trait: Gains [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] at the start of the next action for 1 turn if the user moves 5 tiles or more.
weaponImprint.effect: When applying a buff to an allied target, increases damage dealt by the next active skill by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.

data.effects: This Doll with a ceaseless fountain of inspiration is Griffin's Queen of Inventions. Undeterred by countless setbacks, her mind churns out a whirlwind of quirky, headache-inducing ideas. Yet, when the moment demands it, she always manages to come up with ingenious solutions.

skills.name: Welcome Gift
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Invention of the Century
skills.description: When the user is under the effects of buffs, after attacking, restores HP equal to 45% of attack to the allied target with the lowest HP within 7 tiles. Each buff increases the healing multiplier by 5%, up to a maximum increase of 15%.
skills.descriptionLevel2: When the user is under the effects of buffs, after attacking, restores HP equal to 45% of attack to the allied target with the lowest HP within 7 tiles. Each buff increases the healing multiplier by 10%, up to a maximum increase of 30%.
skills.descriptionLevel3: When the user is under the effects of buffs, after attacking, restores HP equal to 60% of attack to the allied target with the lowest HP within 7 tiles. Each buff increases the healing multiplier by 10%, up to a maximum increase of 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increases the healing multiplier by 10% for each buff the user has, up to a maximum of 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Increases the healing multiplier by 15%.

skills.name: Spicy Candy
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Burn damage equal to 130% of attack. If the user has Blazing Assault, this attack's damage is further increased by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Burn damage equal to 140% of attack. If the user has Blazing Assault, this attack's damage is further increased by 20%.

skills.name: Fireworks Festival
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles to attack, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to them and all enemy targets within 2 tiles. If only 1 target is hit, applies [effect:7d900a53-1edb-4532-9da4-c614b83cb560] to them for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Reduces Confectance Index consumption by 1 point.

skills.name: Surprise Box
skills.description: Apply [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] and 2 random buffs to all allied targets within 6 tiles for 2 turns. For each allied unit in range, gain 1 point of Confectance Index. Gain [effect:2fa0814b-b365-46e5-8e49-39db6e7d5f72], which can be activated up to 2 times per turn for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Apply [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] and 3 random buffs to all allied targets within 6 tiles for 2 turns. For each allied unit in range, gain 1 point of Confectance Index. Gain [effect:2fa0814b-b365-46e5-8e49-39db6e7d5f72], which can be activated up to 2 times per turn for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Apply [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] and 3 random buffs to all allied targets within 6 tiles for 2 turns. For each allied unit in range, gain 2 points of Confectance Index. Gain [effect:2fa0814b-b365-46e5-8e49-39db6e7d5f72], which can be activated up to 2 times per turn for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The number of random buffs granted increases by 1.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Confectance Index gain increases by 1 point.

keys.effect: When using an active heal, there is a 50% chance to apply 1 random buff to the target for 1 turn.
After using an active attack, reduce the cooldown of the Ultimate skill Surprise Box by 2 turns.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.
The active skill Spicy Candy gains a new effect: When the user has Blazing Assault, restores HP equal to 100% of attack to the nearest allied target (excluding the user).
Attack is increased by 3% for each buff the user has, up to a maximum of 15%.
The active skill Fireworks Festival no longer deals damage to enemy targets. Its effect is modified to restore HP equal to 90% of attack to allied targets within range and cleanses 1 debuff.
If Blazing Assault is present at the end of the action, restore HP equal to 20% of attack to self.

vertebrae.effect: The number of random buffs granted increases by 1.

imagoforms.effect: Healing effects received by allies with 50% or lower HP is increased by 8%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
This unit's healing effects are increased by 12%.
